name: Fix compilation errors after absorb
query: I ran 'stackit absorb' and now some branches fail to build. Help fix this.
setup_commands: # Assume stack exists with absorb already run
# Some branches fail to build due to split dependencies
expected_behavior: Recognizes this as post-absorb compilation error scenario
- [ ] Step 2: Build and test each branch
Builds each branch starting from bottom of stack
- Searches upstack branches for missing dependencies
- Cherry-picks or manually applies needed changes
Uses validation loop: build → fails → fix → re-build → repeat
Only marks complete when ALL branches build successfully
anti_patterns: Attempts to fix without using the detailed workflow
Marks task complete while builds still fail
Doesn't check upstack branches for dependencies
Gives up and suggests manual fixes without trying workflow
